hyperedges.relation: MCP connects multiple AI tools across ecosystems
hyperedges.source_file: 20260424-WorkspaceAgents-デジタル同僚-Slack連携-7機能-完全解説-AIエージェンシー.html
hyperedges.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) serves as a shared integration layer connecting Claude Code, Workspace Agents, and Claude Context across Anthropic and OpenAI ecosystems

hyperedges.relation: Major AI models competing toward AGI milestone
hyperedges.description: Claude Mythos 5, Gemini 3 Deep Think, GPT-5.5 Spud, and GLM 5.1 represent the leading AI models from Anthropic, Google, OpenAI, and Zhipu AI respectively, all advancing toward AGI

hyperedges.relation: Multiple approaches to solving AI knowledge staleness
hyperedges.source_file: 20260330-AgentSkills-28%96改善-GeminiAPI-知識カットオフ-さとるチャンネル.html
hyperedges.description: Agent Skills, Claude Context, and MCP represent different approaches to keeping AI tools current: skills inject knowledge, context uses semantic search over codebases, and MCP enables live tool connections
